title: Resolution
description: I'm finally making one of these
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/NRZgMLi.png) ### [Join the discord to interact with me and others about Minecraft](https://discord.gg/QZUJtsbkcY)
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) OVERVIEW ![](https://i.imgur.com/kD11hZu.png) Over the years I've made a lot of packs for personal use and have done item textures for a number of mods, so I thought it was time to finally make a resourcepack to release to the public.
Notes: - This is **VERY** [WIP] but I'll be updating this periodically as I go

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) FEATURES ![](https://i.imgur.com/A8bTUqW.png) - *Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/GenMode/Minecraft/wiki/Resolution) for more information*
Changes - Banners - Blocks - GUIs - Font - Items
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) ALSO CHECK OUT ![](https://i.imgur.com/sdGA9Mw.png) | Resourcepacks | | :-: | | TBA |
